title: derris polyantha
intro: Derris polyantha, also known as the Derris or Tung Oil Tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, Africa, and Australia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which contain rotenone, a toxic compound used as an insecticide. The health benefits of Derris polyantha include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used in traditional medicine to alleviate these conditions.
